skeptic.top_risk: Karma likely collapses into a second activity/social-graph counter rather than a distinct 'appreciation' signal, and is trivially gamed by mutual-boosting and alts.
skeptic.cheapest_evidence: 2-4 week manual/low-code trial in the live server: correlation karma rank vs XP rank plus how many grants come from reciprocal pairs.

builder.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter - highly correlated with XP - so it earns its own leaderboard without carrying a distinct signal.
builder.cheapest_evidence: Bare +karma command to one active server, log grants ~2-4 weeks, compute rank correlation karma vs XP and inspect grant graph for reciprocal pairs.

user_value.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter (helpfulness correlates with talking a lot), making it redundant with XP.
user_value.cheapest_evidence: After N weeks, correlate karma against XP per member; low correlation + a different top-of-leaderboard set proves the axis is distinct.

synth.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter - highly correlated with XP - so it earns its own leaderboard without carrying a distinct 'appreciation' signal, and mutual-boosting/alts launder social gaming as reputation.
synth.cheapest_evidence: Ship a bare, non-spendable +karma command to one active server, log every grant for 2-4 weeks, then compute karma-vs-XP rank correlation (Spearman, thresholds fixed in advance) and inspect the directed grant graph for reciprocal pairs.
synth.report: Panel synthesis: two BUILD (builder, user/value) + one HOLD (skeptic), all 0.6; converge on identical failure mode and falsification test. Disagreement is sequencing, not substance; reconciled verdict BUILD the measurement slice. Core claim semantic (distinct axis). Strongest failure: axis collapse (helpfulness correlates with talking) coupled with mutual-boosting/collusion/sybil laundering gaming as appreciation; secondary social/moral hazard of public 'who is liked' ranking; sparsity/cold-start. Falsification: 2-4 weeks MVP logs: Spearman karma vs XP, grant-graph reciprocity, different top-of-leaderboard set; thresholds fixed in advance. MVP cost low; true cost deferred into anti-gaming/moderation. Smallest slice: purely reputational counter, single grant command, block self+reciprocal grants, per-granter daily cap + per-target cooldown, one server, every grant logged; run leaderboard shadow/private during trial, public launch + spendability gated on distinctness evidence.
